note: B7 T02 corpus-lineage durable local candidate. Shipping = 45 generated + 12 manual_trap = 57 exact tracked ids. NOT canonical, NOT B7 DONE, NOT C6 acceptance, NOT T02 freeze authorization, NOT /opsx:apply. See carrier openspec/changes/add-b7-corpus-lineage-candidate.

shipping_counts.exact_id_set: assembled case_id set MUST equal tracked 57 unique ids; NO invented C6-MANUAL-* rows

sources.identity: exact 45 non-C6-TRAP-* rows from tracked contracts/c6-bench-cases.jsonl with source_kind=generated (identity-preserving content copy)

exact 12 existing C6-TRAP-* rows from tracked contracts/c6-bench-cases.jsonl with source_kind=manual_trap + stable lineage metadata (source_record_id/provenance/rationale/external_layer/authored_at=unknown/captured_at). Valid shipping source, NOT quarantine.

mutations.identity: deliberate-red mutation fixture (cross-source duplicate id / missing case_id / bad state cell). Independent of source denominator; never counted in shipping 45/12/57.

assembler.row_id_conservation: assembled row_count MUST equal sum of source row_counts; assembled case_id set MUST equal union of source case_id sets
assembler.content_equality: after strip_lineage_metadata, assembled content fingerprint equals tracked content fingerprint (parse+sort+canonical). Packaging byte equality is NOT claimed.
fail_closed: cross-source id collision between generated and manual_trap
quarantine: rows with trap_note or source_kind==trap are isolated, never silently merged

recomputable_hashes: per-source sha256 over content-canonical JSON of its rows (lineage metadata stripped)
assembled sha256 over packaging JSON of assembled rows (lineage metadata retained)
compat_sha256 over assembled rows with lineage metadata stripped (content/canonical equality vs tracked fingerprint)
unordered_id_set_sha256 over sorted set of all case_ids
ordered_id_list_sha256 over case_ids in materialization order
verification_scope_limit: dedicated Python + unit + schema + OpenSpec strict only. NO full Swift build, NO GUI, NO S8.
